string.text: {=K5Fvv504}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK} of the house of {CLAN_NAME}, my {?PLAYER.GENDER}lady{?}lord{\?}, and I am honored to serve you.
{=s1FVPS5D}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the {CLAN_NAME}. Our family has served Italy for generations.
{=LbpdzoRd}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the {CLAN_NAME}. Our family has stood in the king's council and discharged its duties honorably since the first days of the kingdom.

{=q5nQGimE}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the {CLAN_NAME}. Though one should not be too proud of one's lineage, I am glad to say that we have always taken seriously our duty to protect the common folk of Italy.
{=DRzsgjsD}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the {CLAN_NAME}, one of the most illustrious families in the annals of Italy.

{=Y8rYJaOa}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the {CLAN_NAME}, one of the most illustrious families in the annals of Italy. The heathens we have slain, and the glory we have won, is second to none.
